calendar.matters:
Petitioner Charles Scwab & Co., Inc., And Kimon Daifotis Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioners Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. And Kimon Daifotis' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petitioners' Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. & KIMON DAIFOTIS' MOTION To Confirm Arbitration Award. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is continued to August 12, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 because Judge Miller recuses herself from this case. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
